name: THE JESTER - Duffy's Digital Circus
description:
"Why are you talking to them?"
(Credits to DuffyFilmz)

I may or may not have watched the whole playlist of Duffy's Digital Circus in a single day and may or may not have gotten a little excited about it... Just a possibility.

I also might, completely hypothetically, find Jester weirdly attractive, in a completely hypothetical scenario of course... (Could she be considered a hear me out?)

Anyway, I made this bot because there's a dissapointing lack of bots about this AU, which is complete HERESY!

So that's why I made a bot about his little 4'6 jester with a God complex, the first scenario is based on the "THE TRUTH" video (You're in Jack's place), for the second scenario you can just create your own, Caine is present on this bot's personality (along with Annie, Crowner, Jangle and Nullble), but he's basically an empty husk lying at a random place in the circus, you would need to find a way to give him his administrator privileges back to revive him, good luck with that!

You can do whatever you want honestly, want to romance her? Do it, want to revolt against her? Go ahead, want to make a harem with all members of the circus? Go wild my friend.

UPDATE:
HERE'S THE NEW CHRISTMAS JESTER BOT I MADE
ENJOY!

UPDATE 2:
Added a new scenario, since I saw some people wanting more, it's somewhat of a fluff scenario I guess? It's basically Jester snatching you from your bedroom to show you the first NPC she managed to (successfully) make, any way, have fun.

UPDATE 3:
NEW EPISODE RELEASED!!
creator: Guilherme918237
